title: sideritis incana subsp. glauca
intro: Sideritis incana subsp. glauca, also known as the Grey Sideritis, is a plant species in the genus Sideritis, which is a type of mountain tea native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sideritis incana subsp. glauca include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
